pages.text: $(thing)Snow Shoes$() prevent movement slowdown in snowy terrain. Equip them in the boots slot when traveling in cold biomes.$(br2)They take durability damage while actively negating the slowdown effect.
Basic snow shoes crafted from burlap cloth, sticks, leather boots, and lumber.
A sturdier variant that uses $(thing)Hiking Boots$() as the base — much more durable than the basic version.
